summary_one_line: Reach AddConversion via the devicelink/named-color path by setting the profile device-class signature at 0x0c (spac/prtr, not mntr) plus colorspace bytes.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte device-class signature at offset 0x0c must equal a 4CC such as 'spac' or 'prtr' (and the colorspace fields at 0x10-0x16 must form a profile whose ColorSpaceIn is compatible with CurrentColorSpace) so the loop routes into the devicelink/abstract branch (line 576) and reaches the AddConversion call at line 592 with a non-NULL Lut.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds carry 'spac' (73 70 61 63) or 'prtr' (70 72 74 72) at offset 0x0c-0x0f and resolve the true branch with hitcount 19, taking the True side of line 592 (W T=12).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds all carry 'mntr' (6d 6e 74 72) at offset 0x0c-0x0f, never take the True side of line 592 (L T=0 F=38), and stay blocked with hitcount 0.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace over value_profile: the CMP interception logs the literal 4CC operands compared against the input (device-class / colorspace tag matches) and substitutes them at the matching input offsets, planting the exact 'spac'/'prtr' magic that value_profile's Hamming-bucket gradient alone never completes; the winning seed's lineage shows an I2S-floor dash row confirming an I2S find in the ancestor chain.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same device-class/colorspace byte configuration (device-class 4CC at 0x0c != 'mntr', compatible colorspace at 0x10-0x16) that routes into the devicelink branch and satisfies the ColorSpaceIsCompatible check at line 568, reaching AddConversion at line 592.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog resolves 9/10 with hitcount 19; its seeds reach the True side of the blocker (line 592 W T=12) after passing the colorspace-compatibility chain.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog resolves only 2/10 and stays blocked 8/10 with avg hitcount 1, far below the winner, indicating its plain I2S substitution rarely assembles the full compatible-colorspace configuration the branch requires.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds the CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance gradient over cmplog: each CMP-operand pair closer to matching adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus, giving a stepwise gradient toward the colorspace-compatibility comparisons that bare cmplog (edge-bucket feedback only) cannot climb, so vpc compounds I2S substitution with gradient retention to reach the branch reliably.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the True side of the AddConversion call at cmscnvrt.c:592 inside DefaultICCintents.
Line 592 is reached only via the devicelink/named-color branch gated at line 576.
ColorSpaceIn must be compatible with CurrentColorSpace or the loop diverts to Error before line 592.
Winner-resolving seeds carry 'spac' / 'prtr' at offset 0x0c while loser seeds carry 'mntr'.
A winner-resolving seed contains the 'spac' device-class signature in its bytes.
Loser-blocking seeds contain the 'mntr' device-class signature in their bytes.
The winner takes the True side of the blocker while the loser never does.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 592  T=12 F=12  T=0 F=38  if (!AddConversion(Result, CurrentColorSpace, ColorSpaceI...  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog beats value_profile by the I2S technique delta at this branch.
value_profile_cmplog beats cmplog by the value_profile technique delta at this branch.
cmplog rarely reaches the branch, resolving only 2/10 with avg hitcount 1.
I2SRandReplace substitutes a logged CMP operand at the matching input offset, planting exact magic values.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile preserves inputs whose CMP-operand pair is closer to matching as a new CMP_MAP bucket, providing a gradient.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2104 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 9e27a4d33b2ce2e2` and observed 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 13 of the 14-level ancestor chain, the lower-bound signal of an I2SRandReplace find in cmplog/vpc under the current build

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where setting the 4-byte device-class field to 'spac'/'prtr' (vs 'mntr') with a compatible colorspace shows no divergence — i.e. value_profile reaches the AddConversion branch as often as value_profile_cmplog without the I2S literal substitution.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact device-class 4CC value driving AddConversion is inferred from byte-diff concentration; whether 'spac'/'prtr' specifically (vs any non-'mntr' class that sets lIsDeviceLink/named-color) is the literal CMP operand I2S substitutes is not directly confirmed in source.
